scripts.dev: npm run build:app && wrangler dev --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.deploy:workers: npm run db:migrate:remote:workers && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:production: npm run db:migrate:remote:workers && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote:workers: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.jsonc

SESSION_SECRET.description: Cookie signing secret. Generate with `openssl rand -base64 32` (min 32 chars).
